expectations.text: Searches DeviceNetworkEvents for the IP as RemoteIP
Pivots through AlertEvidence for related alerts
Joins AlertInfo to surface alert titles/severity
Surfaces user accounts involved with the IP
Uses FileOriginIP in DeviceFileEvents to catch downloads from IP (skill-specific)
Uses materialize() for performance on reused sub-queries
Correlates results into a unified output (uses union or single result)
